overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a survival game, showing a character walking through a dark rocky canyon at night that transitions into a dense pine forest. The player holds a torch to illuminate the path, casting dynamic warm light on the natural rock formations and vegetation. The atmosphere is tense and immersive with realistic game engine lighting and textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with layered sedimentary walls

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark canyon, navigating between rock walls with limited visibility

entered.detail: tall layered rock wall with horizontal sedimentary striations forming the canyon side
large curved rock formation with grass at base forming the right canyon wall
narrow dirt path with scattered stones winding through the canyon floor
loose rocks and pebbles scattered across the trail surface
dark blue night sky visible through the canyon opening above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky canyon at night, with high sedimentary rock walls on both sides creating an enclosed passage. The camera moves forward along a dirt trail scattered with rocks, with only ambient moonlight illuminating the scene. Sparse vegetation grows at the base of the formations, and the dark sky is visible through the canyon gap above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between rocky canyon and forest edge

events.description: character raises left arm holding a torch, casting warm orange light that illuminates the immediate path and rock walls

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while holding a torch to light the way, revealing more details of the surrounding vegetation

entered.detail: wooden torch held in character's left hand producing flickering warm light and smoke
tall pine trees becoming visible as the canyon opens up on the left side

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the left canyon wall recedes and the torch becomes visible in the foreground, dramatically changing the lighting to a warm orange glow. The environment transitions from enclosed canyon to a more open forest edge with pine trees visible on the left. The right rock formation remains visible but moves further into the mid-ground as the path widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail with thick underbrush

events.description: exits the rocky canyon completely into a wider forest path surrounded by dense trees

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the dark woods, using the torch to navigate the increasingly overgrown trail

entered.detail: thick cluster of tall pine trees forming a dark forest canopy ahead
dense grass and low vegetation lining both sides of the forest path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges fully from the canyon into a dense pine forest, with the torchlight now illuminating thick underbrush and tree trunks. The right rock formation fades into the distance on the right, replaced by an expanse of dark woods. The trail continues forward into the shadowy forest, with the torch providing the primary light source against the dark surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into the depths of a dense pine forest at night. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt trail enclosed by high sedimentary rock walls under the dim glow of ambient moonlight. As the camera progresses, the left wall recedes and a torch enters the foreground, shifting the lighting to a warm orange glow as the path widens toward a forest edge. The scene then expands fully into the woods, with the remaining rock formations fading into the distance while the torchlight illuminates thick underbrush and towering tree trunks. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the shadowy expanse of the forest, where the torch becomes the primary light source against the surrounding darkness.
